item.title: Yeet
item.dc:creator: magicspromise

item.title: Witchy Wednesday #4 (Mature)
item.description:
Artist: Sveta Shubina Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sveta_has/?hl=en (Marked Mature for obvious reasons) This is the 4th (3rd one was removed), and final (for now) Mature Witchy Wednesday. There's something so cool about the nude witch aesthetic that just feels right. These are a little more vague on the theme, but I really like her artwork. I've posted this artist's art before and it was fine,
Artist: Sveta Shubina
Artist: Sveta Shubina
Artist: Sveta Shubina
Artist: Sveta Shubina

Fun stuff. Not dead. Appreciate the nice comments/messages/posts. Working my way through responding to everyone. Smooches.

item.title: Personal space heater
item.description:
Normally the dogs sleep in their crates, but since I was downstairs anyway I left 'em out. Worked out well for both of us!
I started off with two dogs, but the girl dog tends to overheat so she adjourned to the other couch around midnight.

item.title: Ahead of THT… Whatever Wednesday
item.description: My last post sparked funny debates about Imgur week days and selfies… Thanks for the kind messages and all the suggestions, I tried to combine my favorites (see tags ?). I might be busy later so here’s some early THT too! Edit: a couple of people have mentioned Boxxy… and I see it. I had never seen it… whyyyy

item.title: Did you ever have so much fun?
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Ok, so seriously...
item.description: What in the actual fuck? There is no way this ends in a good way. I mean, imagine working at a job and 2 months before your boss wants to fire you, they just announce at a company meeting that you are getting fired? How do you deal with that? What do you do? How do you execute the duties of your job knowing that your being let go? I mean, this is almost guaranteed to blow up badly, right? If these people just decide to say "fuck it" and stop doing their jobs properly? It could be seen as musk being directly responsible for these people just not working. What. In. The. Actual. Fuck? Front page of CNN, right now, 0929 11/27/2024 https://www.cnn.com/2024/11/27/business/elon-musk-government-employees-targets/index.html
item.dc:creator: scottsn

item.title: Fantasy & Rpg Megadump!
item.description:
Teenage normal fighting lions!
EDIT: Thanks for the upvotes everyone! Remember to always check with the shaman before drinking the blue potion, or any potion! I do some reviews as a hobby, if you wanna check them, feel free to visit https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/
The torch is a sword too
But could be worse, could be a water temple.
EDIT: Thanks for the upvotes, everyone! I wish you good rolls in a table surrounded by friends! I do some reviews (As a hobby, not paid!) at https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/ feel free to check them!
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter
